scoreScope: Deterministic guardrail for the current docs, dictionary generation, GitHub Pages demo, public accounting, and backlog-tracking gate. This is not a platform completion metric.

items.requirement: New platform spec is available to the loop.
Customer-facing portal exists and renders docs as HTML.
Portal does not link users to raw Markdown or YAML docs.
API specs are rendered with Redoc or equivalent.
items.detail: Hosted JSON, local OneRoster, and QTI OpenAPI pages exist.

items.requirement: OneRoster core has runnable SQL and JSON demo surfaces.
items.detail: SQLite schema/seed/server/test plus hosted static JSON and browser SQL console.

items.requirement: Hosted API URLs use real GitHub Pages URLs, not example.edu/example API hosts.
items.detail: GitHub Pages URL present and example API hosts absent.

items.requirement: OneRoster core dictionary generates SQL comments, OpenAPI descriptions, and docs.
items.detail: OneRoster structured source and generated artifacts exist.

items.requirement: QTI repository projection is structured and generated.
items.detail: QTI structured source and generated artifacts exist.
CASE structured source and generated artifacts are required.
Caliper structured source and generated artifacts are required.

items.requirement: LTI, Security Framework, and Data Privacy are structured/generated or explicitly deferred.
items.detail: Integration/governance structured source and artifacts are required.

items.requirement: Generated dictionary artifacts are checked for object/field/value coverage.
Every Lead spec is accounted for in the Lead spec accounting page.
items.detail: Lead spec accounting includes all current Lead specs.
Decision page covers the required overlap areas plus tenancy.

items.requirement: Portal explains what the platform provides and what app developers own.
Missing spec work is tracked as TODO backlog, not only in chat.
Coverage matrix distinguishes generated, runnable, deferred, and unsupported areas.
items.detail: Coverage matrix exists with required columns.

items.requirement: Machine-readable status/spec report is published for AI agents.
Backend gap is explicit until a real database/API server exists.
items.detail: Backlog explicitly states the remaining hosted backend gap.

knownNonScoredGaps: Full OneRoster 1.2 accounting beyond the current core demo slice.
Generated cross-spec decision traces that connect dictionary fields to architectural decisions.
A platform-status manifest distinct from the score-gate report.
Hosted Supabase database is live for the current OneRoster core demo slice; broader hosted database coverage is still pending.
A real hosted JSON API runtime beyond static GitHub Pages and local Express.
A real hosted SQL query endpoint against shared demo data.
Tenant model, row-level isolation, OAuth scopes, and auth-boundary enforcement.
Runnable CASE import/search, QTI package import/projection, Caliper event ingestion, and LTI launch/Advantage sandbox slices.
Conformance-style fixtures, support notes, and formal certification evidence.
Generated dictionary portal canonical URL cleanup.
Codex loop harness runbook and smoke tests.
